action_mappings.release_payout_rail: release dispute case {} from payout rail {}

action_mappings.release_external_refund_account: release external refund account {} from dispute case {}
action_mappings.confirm_refund_account_binding: confirm the binding of external refund account {} for dispute case {}
action_mappings.consume_manual_approval_token: consume manual approval token {} for dispute case {}
action_mappings.apply_compliance_record: apply compliance record {} to dispute case {} with external refund account {}
action_mappings.verify_compliance_using_template: verify compliance for dispute case {} using payout instruction template {}

action_mappings.release_liquidity_bucket: release dispute case {} from liquidity bucket {}

action_mappings.release_acquirer_account: release dispute case {} from acquirer account {}

action_mappings.release_card_network: release dispute case {} from card network {}
action_mappings.bind_beneficiary_account: bind dispute case {} to beneficiary account {}
action_mappings.release_beneficiary_account: release beneficiary account {} from dispute case {}

action_mappings.prepare_settlement_schedule_with_clearin: prepare settlement schedule {} with clearing reference {} for dispute case {} on card network {}

action_mappings.compute_authorization: compute authorization for dispute case {} using liquidity bucket {}, acquirer account {}, and merchant routing profile {}
action_mappings.compute_authorization_with_routing: compute authorization with routing for dispute case {} using card network {}, beneficiary account {}, and issuer routing profile {}
action_mappings.finalize_authorization: finalize authorization for dispute case {} using liquidity bucket {} and acquirer account {}
action_mappings.apply_compliance_and_confirm: apply compliance and confirm for dispute case {} using external refund account {} and compliance record {}
action_mappings.mark_refund_account_finalized: mark refund account finalized for dispute case {} with external refund account {}

action_mappings.confirm_template_binding: confirm binding of payout instruction template {} to external case {} with internal case {}
action_mappings.acknowledge_finalization: acknowledge finalization of dispute case {} with external refund account {} and compliance record {}

action_mappings.finalize_settlement_with_acknowledgement: finalize settlement for dispute case {} with acknowledgement

action_mappings_indef.assign_payout_rail: assign a dispute case {} to a payout rail {}
action_mappings_indef.release_payout_rail: release a dispute case {} from a payout rail {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_external_refund_account: reserve an external refund account {} for a dispute case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_external_refund_account: release an external refund account {} from a dispute case {}
action_mappings_indef.confirm_refund_account_binding: confirm the binding of an external refund account {} for a dispute case {}
action_mappings_indef.consume_manual_approval_token: consume a manual approval token {} for a dispute case {}

action_mappings_indef.verify_compliance_using_template: verify compliance for a dispute case {} using a payout instruction template {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_liquidity_bucket: reserve a dispute case {} in a liquidity bucket {}
action_mappings_indef.release_liquidity_bucket: release a dispute case {} from a liquidity bucket {}
action_mappings_indef.bind_acquirer_account: bind a dispute case {} to an acquirer account {}
action_mappings_indef.release_acquirer_account: release a dispute case {} from an acquirer account {}
action_mappings_indef.bind_card_network: bind a dispute case {} to a card network {}
action_mappings_indef.release_card_network: release a dispute case {} from a card network {}
action_mappings_indef.bind_beneficiary_account: bind a dispute case {} to a beneficiary account {}
action_mappings_indef.release_beneficiary_account: release a beneficiary account {} from a dispute case {}
action_mappings_indef.prepare_settlement_schedule: prepare a settlement schedule {} for a dispute case {} using a liquidity bucket {} and an acquirer account {}
action_mappings_indef.prepare_settlement_schedule_with_clearin: prepare a settlement schedule {} with a clearing reference {} for a dispute case {} on a card network {}
action_mappings_indef.reconcile_execution_plan: reconcile execution plan for a dispute case {} using a liquidity bucket {} and an acquirer account {}

predicate_mappings.case_assigned_rail: {} is assigned to the payout rail {}
predicate_mappings.case_rail_allocation_committed: the rail allocation for {} is committed
predicate_mappings.case_refund_account_confirmed: the refund account for {} is confirmed
predicate_mappings.case_reserved_liquidity: {} is reserved in the liquidity bucket {}
predicate_mappings.case_bound_acquirer_account: {} is bound to the acquirer account {}
predicate_mappings.case_bound_card_network: {} is bound to the card network {}
predicate_mappings.case_bound_beneficiary_account: {} is bound to the beneficiary account {}
predicate_mappings.case_execution_plan_committed: an execution plan for {} is committed
predicate_mappings.case_template_link_external: {} is linked to the external template {}
predicate_mappings.case_allowed_liquidity_bucket: {} case is allowed in {} liquidity bucket
predicate_mappings.case_allowed_acquirer_account: {} case is allowed in {} acquirer account
predicate_mappings.case_allowed_card_network: {} case is allowed in {} card network
predicate_mappings.case_allowed_clearing_reference: {} case is allowed with {} clearing reference
predicate_mappings.case_allowed_beneficiary_account: {} case is allowed with {} beneficiary account
predicate_mappings.case_routing_profile: {} case is associated with {} routing profile
predicate_mappings.case_internal_case_template_bound: {} case is bound to {} payout instruction template
predicate_mappings.case_bound_external_refund_account: {} is bound to the external refund account {}
predicate_mappings.internal_case_template_applicable: the internal case template is applicable for {} with {}

register_dispute_case.description: register a dispute case A as a registered case
preconditions: I can only register a dispute case A as a registered case if it is not the case that A is a registered case and it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I register a dispute case A as a registered case, it is the case that A is a registered case

assign_payout_rail.description: assign a dispute case A to a payout rail B
preconditions: I can only assign a dispute case A to a payout rail B if it is the case that A is a registered case and B payout rail is available and A case is supported by B rail
I can only assign a dispute case A to a payout rail B if it is not the case that the rail allocation for A is committed
effects: Once I assign a dispute case A to a payout rail B, it is the case that A is assigned to the payout rail B and the rail allocation for A is committed
Once I assign a dispute case A to a payout rail B, it is not the case anymore that B payout rail is available

release_payout_rail.description: release a dispute case A from a payout rail B
preconditions: I can only release a dispute case A from a payout rail B if it is the case that A is assigned to the payout rail B
I can only release a dispute case A from a payout rail B if it is not the case that an execution plan for A is committed and it is not the case that authorization for A is verified
effects: Once I release a dispute case A from a payout rail B, it is the case that B payout rail is available

Once I release a dispute case A from a payout rail B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the payout rail B and it is not the case anymore that the rail allocation for A is committed and it is not the case anymore that the refund account for A is confirmed and it is not the case anymore that compliance for A is verified and it is not the case anymore that approval token is present for A and it is not the case anymore that authorization is finalized for A and it is not the case anymore that the clearing required flag for A

reserve_external_refund_account.description: reserve an external refund account B for a dispute case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an external refund account B for a dispute case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B external refund account is available
effects: Once I reserve an external refund account B for a dispute case A, it is the case that A is bound to the external refund account B
Once I reserve an external refund account B for a dispute case A, it is not the case anymore that B external refund account is available

release_external_refund_account.description: release an external refund account B from a dispute case A
preconditions: I can only release an external refund account B from a dispute case A if it is the case that A is bound to the external refund account B
effects: Once I release an external refund account B from a dispute case A, it is the case that B external refund account is available
Once I release an external refund account B from a dispute case A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the external refund account B

confirm_refund_account_binding.description: confirm the binding of an external refund account B for a dispute case A
preconditions: I can only confirm the binding of an external refund account B for a dispute case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the rail allocation for A is committed and A is bound to the external refund account B
I can only confirm the binding of an external refund account B for a dispute case A if it is not the case that the refund account for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm the binding of an external refund account B for a dispute case A, it is the case that the refund account for A is confirmed

consume_manual_approval_token.description: consume a manual approval token B for a dispute case A
preconditions: I can only consume a manual approval token B for a dispute case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the rail allocation for A is committed and B manual approval token is available
I can only consume a manual approval token B for a dispute case A if it is not the case that the refund account for A is confirmed
effects: Once I consume a manual approval token B for a dispute case A, it is the case that the refund account for A is confirmed and approval token is present for A
Once I consume a manual approval token B for a dispute case A, it is not the case anymore that B manual approval token is available

apply_compliance_record.description: apply a compliance record C to a dispute case A with an external refund account B
preconditions: I can only apply a compliance record C to a dispute case A with an external refund account B if it is the case that the refund account for A is confirmed and the rail allocation for A is committed and A is bound to the external refund account B and C compliance record is available
I can only apply a compliance record C to a dispute case A with an external refund account B if it is not the case that compliance for A is verified
effects: Once I apply a compliance record C to a dispute case A with an external refund account B, it is the case that compliance for A is verified
Once I apply a compliance record C to a dispute case A with an external refund account B, it is not the case anymore that approval token is present for A

verify_compliance_using_template.description: verify compliance for a dispute case A using a payout instruction template B
preconditions: I can only verify compliance for a dispute case A using a payout instruction template B if it is the case that the rail allocation for A is committed and A is confirmed with the template B
I can only verify compliance for a dispute case A using a payout instruction template B if it is not the case that compliance for A is verified
effects: Once I verify compliance for a dispute case A using a payout instruction template B, it is the case that compliance for A is verified
Once I verify compliance for a dispute case A using a payout instruction template B, it is not the case anymore that approval token is present for A

reserve_liquidity_bucket.description: reserve a dispute case A in a liquidity bucket B
preconditions: I can only reserve a dispute case A in a liquidity bucket B if it is the case that A is a registered case and B liquidity bucket is available and A case is allowed in B liquidity bucket
effects: Once I reserve a dispute case A in a liquidity bucket B, it is the case that A is reserved in the liquidity bucket B
Once I reserve a dispute case A in a liquidity bucket B, it is not the case anymore that B liquidity bucket is available

release_liquidity_bucket.description: release a dispute case A from a liquidity bucket B
preconditions: I can only release a dispute case A from a liquidity bucket B if it is the case that A is reserved in the liquidity bucket B
effects: Once I release a dispute case A from a liquidity bucket B, it is the case that B liquidity bucket is available
Once I release a dispute case A from a liquidity bucket B, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved in the liquidity bucket B

bind_acquirer_account.description: bind a dispute case A to an acquirer account B
preconditions: I can only bind a dispute case A to an acquirer account B if it is the case that A is a registered case and B acquirer account is available and A case is allowed in B acquirer account
effects: Once I bind a dispute case A to an acquirer account B, it is the case that A is bound to the acquirer account B
Once I bind a dispute case A to an acquirer account B, it is not the case anymore that B acquirer account is available

release_acquirer_account.description: release a dispute case A from an acquirer account B
preconditions: I can only release a dispute case A from an acquirer account B if it is the case that A is bound to the acquirer account B
effects: Once I release a dispute case A from an acquirer account B, it is the case that B acquirer account is available
Once I release a dispute case A from an acquirer account B, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the acquirer account B

bind_card_network.description: bind a dispute case A to a card network B
preconditions: I can only bind a dispute case A to a card network B if it is the case that A is a registered case and B card network is available and A case is allowed in B card network
effects: Once I bind a dispute case A to a card network B, it is the case that A is bound to the card network B
Once I bind a dispute case A to a card network B, it is not the case anymore that B card network is available

release_card_network.description: release a dispute case A from a card network B
preconditions: I can only release a dispute case A from a card network B if it is the case that A is bound to the card network B
effects: Once I release a dispute case A from a card network B, it is the case that B card network is available
Once I release a dispute case A from a card network B, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the card network B

bind_beneficiary_account.description: bind a dispute case A to a beneficiary account B
preconditions: I can only bind a dispute case A to a beneficiary account B if it is the case that A is a registered case and B beneficiary account is available and A case is allowed with B beneficiary account
effects: Once I bind a dispute case A to a beneficiary account B, it is the case that A is bound to the beneficiary account B
Once I bind a dispute case A to a beneficiary account B, it is not the case anymore that B beneficiary account is available

release_beneficiary_account.description: release a beneficiary account B from a dispute case A
preconditions: I can only release a beneficiary account B from a dispute case A if it is the case that A is bound to the beneficiary account B
effects: Once I release a beneficiary account B from a dispute case A, it is the case that B beneficiary account is available
Once I release a beneficiary account B from a dispute case A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the beneficiary account B

prepare_settlement_schedule.description: prepare a settlement schedule B for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket C and an acquirer account D
preconditions: I can only prepare a settlement schedule B for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket C and an acquirer account D if it is the case that the rail allocation for A is committed and A is reserved in the liquidity bucket C and A is bound to the acquirer account D and B schedule is available and A case is supported by B schedule
I can only prepare a settlement schedule B for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket C and an acquirer account D if it is not the case that an execution plan for A is committed
effects: Once I prepare a settlement schedule B for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket C and an acquirer account D, it is the case that A is scheduled for settlement on B and an execution plan for A is committed
Once I prepare a settlement schedule B for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket C and an acquirer account D, it is not the case anymore that B schedule is available

prepare_settlement_schedule_with_clearin.description: prepare a settlement schedule B with a clearing reference D for a dispute case A on a card network C
preconditions: I can only prepare a settlement schedule B with a clearing reference D for a dispute case A on a card network C if it is the case that the rail allocation for A is committed and A is bound to the card network C and D clearing reference is available and B schedule is available and A case is supported by B schedule and A case is allowed with D clearing reference
I can only prepare a settlement schedule B with a clearing reference D for a dispute case A on a card network C if it is not the case that an execution plan for A is committed
effects: Once I prepare a settlement schedule B with a clearing reference D for a dispute case A on a card network C, it is the case that A is scheduled for settlement on B and an execution plan for A is committed and the clearing required flag for A and approval token is present for A

Once I prepare a settlement schedule B with a clearing reference D for a dispute case A on a card network C, it is not the case anymore that B schedule is available and it is not the case anymore that D clearing reference is available

reconcile_execution_plan.description: reconcile execution plan for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket B and an acquirer account C
preconditions: I can only reconcile execution plan for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket B and an acquirer account C if it is the case that an execution plan for A is committed and the clearing required flag for A and A is reserved in the liquidity bucket B and A is bound to the acquirer account C
effects: Once I reconcile execution plan for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket B and an acquirer account C, it is not the case anymore that the clearing required flag for A and it is not the case anymore that approval token is present for A

compute_authorization.description: compute authorization for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket B, an acquirer account C, and a merchant routing profile D
preconditions: I can only compute authorization for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket B, an acquirer account C, and a merchant routing profile D if it is the case that compliance for A is verified and an execution plan for A is committed and A is reserved in the liquidity bucket B and A is bound to the acquirer account C and A case is associated with D routing profile

I can only compute authorization for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket B, an acquirer account C, and a merchant routing profile D if it is not the case that approval token is present for A and it is not the case that authorization for A is verified
effects: Once I compute authorization for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket B, an acquirer account C, and a merchant routing profile D, it is the case that authorization for A is verified

compute_authorization_with_routing.description: compute authorization with routing for a dispute case A using a card network B, a beneficiary account C, and an issuer routing profile D
preconditions: I can only compute authorization with routing for a dispute case A using a card network B, a beneficiary account C, and an issuer routing profile D if it is the case that compliance for A is verified and an execution plan for A is committed and A is bound to the card network B and A is bound to the beneficiary account C and A case is associated with D routing profile

I can only compute authorization with routing for a dispute case A using a card network B, a beneficiary account C, and an issuer routing profile D if it is not the case that authorization for A is verified
effects: Once I compute authorization with routing for a dispute case A using a card network B, a beneficiary account C, and an issuer routing profile D, it is the case that authorization for A is verified and approval token is present for A

finalize_authorization.description: finalize authorization for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket B and an acquirer account C
preconditions: I can only finalize authorization for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket B and an acquirer account C if it is the case that authorization for A is verified and approval token is present for A and A is reserved in the liquidity bucket B and A is bound to the acquirer account C
effects: Once I finalize authorization for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket B and an acquirer account C, it is the case that authorization is finalized for A

Once I finalize authorization for a dispute case A using a liquidity bucket B and an acquirer account C, it is not the case anymore that approval token is present for A and it is not the case anymore that compliance for A is verified and it is not the case anymore that the clearing required flag for A

apply_compliance_and_confirm.description: apply compliance and confirm for a dispute case A using an external refund account B and a compliance record C
preconditions: I can only apply compliance and confirm for a dispute case A using an external refund account B and a compliance record C if it is the case that authorization is finalized for A and authorization for A is verified and the rail allocation for A is committed and A is bound to the external refund account B and C compliance record is available
I can only apply compliance and confirm for a dispute case A using an external refund account B and a compliance record C if it is not the case that compliance for A is verified
effects: Once I apply compliance and confirm for a dispute case A using an external refund account B and a compliance record C, it is the case that compliance for A is verified

mark_refund_account_finalized.description: mark refund account finalized for a dispute case A with an external refund account B
preconditions: I can only mark refund account finalized for a dispute case A with an external refund account B if it is the case that authorization for A is verified and compliance for A is verified and A is bound to the external refund account B

I can only mark refund account finalized for a dispute case A with an external refund account B if it is not the case that approval token is present for A and it is not the case that refund account for A is finalized
effects: Once I mark refund account finalized for a dispute case A with an external refund account B, it is the case that refund account for A is finalized

consume_manual_token_and_mark_final.description: consume a manual approval token B and mark a dispute case A final
preconditions: I can only consume a manual approval token B and mark a dispute case A final if it is the case that authorization for A is verified and compliance for A is verified and B manual approval token is available
I can only consume a manual approval token B and mark a dispute case A final if it is not the case that approval token is present for A and it is not the case that refund account for A is finalized
effects: Once I consume a manual approval token B and mark a dispute case A final, it is the case that refund account for A is finalized
Once I consume a manual approval token B and mark a dispute case A final, it is not the case anymore that B manual approval token is available

bind_template_to_case.description: bind a payout instruction template B to a dispute case A
preconditions: I can only bind a payout instruction template B to a dispute case A if it is the case that refund account for A is finalized and B template is available and the internal case template is applicable for A with B
effects: Once I bind a payout instruction template B to a dispute case A, it is the case that A case is bound to B payout instruction template
Once I bind a payout instruction template B to a dispute case A, it is not the case anymore that B template is available

confirm_template_binding.description: confirm binding of a payout instruction template C to an external case A with an internal case B
preconditions: I can only confirm binding of a payout instruction template C to an external case A with an internal case B if it is the case that A is a registered case and A is an external case and A is linked to the external template C and B case is bound to C payout instruction template
I can only confirm binding of a payout instruction template C to an external case A with an internal case B if it is not the case that A is confirmed with the template C
effects: Once I confirm binding of a payout instruction template C to an external case A with an internal case B, it is the case that A is confirmed with the template C

acknowledge_finalization.description: acknowledge finalization of a dispute case A with an external refund account B and a compliance record C
preconditions: I can only acknowledge finalization of a dispute case A with an external refund account B and a compliance record C if it is the case that A is a registered case and A is an external case and compliance for A is verified and refund account for A is finalized and A is bound to the external refund account B and C compliance record is available
I can only acknowledge finalization of a dispute case A with an external refund account B and a compliance record C if it is not the case that A finalization is acknowledged
effects: Once I acknowledge finalization of a dispute case A with an external refund account B and a compliance record C, it is the case that A finalization is acknowledged

finalize_settlement.description: finalize settlement for a dispute case A
preconditions: I can only finalize settlement for a dispute case A if it is the case that A is an internal case and A is a registered case and the rail allocation for A is committed and an execution plan for A is committed and authorization for A is verified and refund account for A is finalized and compliance for A is verified
I can only finalize settlement for a dispute case A if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize settlement for a dispute case A, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_settlement_with_template_bindin.description: finalize settlement for a dispute case A with a payout instruction template B
preconditions: I can only finalize settlement for a dispute case A with a payout instruction template B if it is the case that A is an external case and A is a registered case and the rail allocation for A is committed and an execution plan for A is committed and authorization for A is verified and refund account for A is finalized and compliance for A is verified and A is confirmed with the template B
I can only finalize settlement for a dispute case A with a payout instruction template B if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize settlement for a dispute case A with a payout instruction template B, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_settlement_with_acknowledgement.description: finalize settlement for a dispute case A with acknowledgement
preconditions: I can only finalize settlement for a dispute case A with acknowledgement if it is the case that A is an external case and A is a registered case and the rail allocation for A is committed and an execution plan for A is committed and authorization for A is verified and refund account for A is finalized and compliance for A is verified and A finalization is acknowledged
I can only finalize settlement for a dispute case A with acknowledgement if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize settlement for a dispute case A with acknowledgement, it is the case that A is finalized

action_nl_templates.register_dispute_case: register dispute case {?dispute_case} as a registered case
action_nl_templates.assign_payout_rail: assign dispute case {?dispute_case} to payout rail {?payout_rail}
action_nl_templates.release_payout_rail: release dispute case {?dispute_case} from payout rail {?payout_rail}
action_nl_templates.reserve_external_refund_account: reserve external refund account {?external_refund_account} for dispute case {?dispute_case}
action_nl_templates.release_external_refund_account: release external refund account {?external_refund_account} from dispute case {?dispute_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_refund_account_binding: confirm the binding of external refund account {?external_refund_account} for dispute case {?dispute_case}
action_nl_templates.consume_manual_approval_token: consume manual approval token {?manual_approval_token} for dispute case {?dispute_case}
action_nl_templates.apply_compliance_record: apply compliance record {?compliance_record} to dispute case {?dispute_case} with external refund account {?external_refund_account}
action_nl_templates.verify_compliance_using_template: verify compliance for dispute case {?dispute_case} using payout instruction template {?payout_instruction_template}
action_nl_templates.reserve_liquidity_bucket: reserve dispute case {?dispute_case} in liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}
action_nl_templates.release_liquidity_bucket: release dispute case {?dispute_case} from liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}
action_nl_templates.bind_acquirer_account: bind dispute case {?dispute_case} to acquirer account {?acquirer_account}
action_nl_templates.release_acquirer_account: release dispute case {?dispute_case} from acquirer account {?acquirer_account}
action_nl_templates.bind_card_network: bind dispute case {?dispute_case} to card network {?card_network}
action_nl_templates.release_card_network: release dispute case {?dispute_case} from card network {?card_network}
action_nl_templates.bind_beneficiary_account: bind dispute case {?dispute_case} to beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account}
action_nl_templates.release_beneficiary_account: release beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account} from dispute case {?dispute_case}
action_nl_templates.prepare_settlement_schedule: prepare settlement schedule {?settlement_schedule} for dispute case {?dispute_case} using liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket} and acquirer account {?acquirer_account}
action_nl_templates.prepare_settlement_schedule_with_clearin: prepare settlement schedule {?settlement_schedule} with clearing reference {?clearing_reference} for dispute case {?dispute_case} on card network {?card_network}
action_nl_templates.reconcile_execution_plan: reconcile execution plan for dispute case {?dispute_case} using liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket} and acquirer account {?acquirer_account}
action_nl_templates.compute_authorization: compute authorization for dispute case {?dispute_case} using liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}, acquirer account {?acquirer_account}, and merchant routing profile {?merchant_routing_profile}
action_nl_templates.compute_authorization_with_routing: compute authorization with routing for dispute case {?dispute_case} using card network {?card_network}, beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account}, and issuer routing profile {?issuer_routing_profile}
action_nl_templates.finalize_authorization: finalize authorization for dispute case {?dispute_case} using liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket} and acquirer account {?acquirer_account}
action_nl_templates.apply_compliance_and_confirm: apply compliance and confirm for dispute case {?dispute_case} using external refund account {?external_refund_account} and compliance record {?compliance_record}
action_nl_templates.mark_refund_account_finalized: mark refund account finalized for dispute case {?dispute_case} with external refund account {?external_refund_account}
action_nl_templates.consume_manual_token_and_mark_final: consume manual approval token {?manual_approval_token} and mark dispute case {?dispute_case} final
action_nl_templates.bind_template_to_case: bind payout instruction template {?payout_instruction_template} to dispute case {?dispute_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_template_binding: confirm binding of payout instruction template {?payout_instruction_template} to external case {?external_case_id} with internal case {?internal_case_id}
action_nl_templates.acknowledge_finalization: acknowledge finalization of dispute case {?dispute_case} with external refund account {?external_refund_account} and compliance record {?compliance_record}
action_nl_templates.finalize_settlement_with_template_bindin: finalize settlement for dispute case {?dispute_case} with payout instruction template {?payout_instruction_template}
action_nl_templates.finalize_settlement_with_acknowledgement: finalize settlement for dispute case {?dispute_case} with acknowledgement

predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_rail: {?dispute_case} is assigned to the payout rail {?payout_rail}
predicate_nl_templates.case_rail_allocation_committed: the rail allocation for {?dispute_case} is committed
predicate_nl_templates.case_refund_account_confirmed: the refund account for {?dispute_case} is confirmed
predicate_nl_templates.case_reserved_liquidity: {?dispute_case} is reserved in the liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}
predicate_nl_templates.case_bound_acquirer_account: {?dispute_case} is bound to the acquirer account {?acquirer_account}
predicate_nl_templates.case_bound_card_network: {?dispute_case} is bound to the card network {?card_network}
predicate_nl_templates.case_bound_beneficiary_account: {?dispute_case} is bound to the beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account}
predicate_nl_templates.case_execution_plan_committed: an execution plan for {?dispute_case} is committed
predicate_nl_templates.case_template_link_external: {?dispute_case} is linked to the external template {?payout_instruction_template}
predicate_nl_templates.case_allowed_liquidity_bucket: {?dispute_case} case is allowed in {?liquidity_bucket} liquidity bucket
predicate_nl_templates.case_allowed_acquirer_account: {?dispute_case} case is allowed in {?acquirer_account} acquirer account
predicate_nl_templates.case_allowed_card_network: {?dispute_case} case is allowed in {?card_network} card network
predicate_nl_templates.case_allowed_clearing_reference: {?dispute_case} case is allowed with {?clearing_reference} clearing reference
predicate_nl_templates.case_allowed_beneficiary_account: {?dispute_case} case is allowed with {?beneficiary_account} beneficiary account
predicate_nl_templates.case_routing_profile: {?dispute_case} case is associated with {?routing_profile} routing profile
predicate_nl_templates.case_internal_case_template_bound: {?dispute_case} case is bound to {?payout_instruction_template} payout instruction template
predicate_nl_templates.case_bound_external_refund_account: {?dispute_case} is bound to the external refund account {?external_refund_account}
predicate_nl_templates.internal_case_template_applicable: the internal case template is applicable for {?dispute_case} with {?payout_instruction_template}

action_nl_templates_indef.register_dispute_case: register a dispute case {?dispute_case} as a registered case
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_payout_rail: assign a dispute case {?dispute_case} to a payout rail {?payout_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_payout_rail: release a dispute case {?dispute_case} from a payout rail {?payout_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_external_refund_account: reserve an external refund account {?external_refund_account} for a dispute case {?dispute_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_external_refund_account: release an external refund account {?external_refund_account} from a dispute case {?dispute_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_refund_account_binding: confirm the binding of an external refund account {?external_refund_account} for a dispute case {?dispute_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.consume_manual_approval_token: consume a manual approval token {?manual_approval_token} for a dispute case {?dispute_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_compliance_record: apply a compliance record {?compliance_record} to a dispute case {?dispute_case} with an external refund account {?external_refund_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.verify_compliance_using_template: verify compliance for a dispute case {?dispute_case} using a payout instruction template {?payout_instruction_template}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_liquidity_bucket: reserve a dispute case {?dispute_case} in a liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_liquidity_bucket: release a dispute case {?dispute_case} from a liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_acquirer_account: bind a dispute case {?dispute_case} to an acquirer account {?acquirer_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_acquirer_account: release a dispute case {?dispute_case} from an acquirer account {?acquirer_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_card_network: bind a dispute case {?dispute_case} to a card network {?card_network}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_card_network: release a dispute case {?dispute_case} from a card network {?card_network}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_beneficiary_account: bind a dispute case {?dispute_case} to a beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_beneficiary_account: release a beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account} from a dispute case {?dispute_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.prepare_settlement_schedule: prepare a settlement schedule {?settlement_schedule} for a dispute case {?dispute_case} using a liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket} and an acquirer account {?acquirer_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.prepare_settlement_schedule_with_clearin: prepare a settlement schedule {?settlement_schedule} with a clearing reference {?clearing_reference} for a dispute case {?dispute_case} on a card network {?card_network}
action_nl_templates_indef.reconcile_execution_plan: reconcile execution plan for a dispute case {?dispute_case} using a liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket} and an acquirer account {?acquirer_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.compute_authorization: compute authorization for a dispute case {?dispute_case} using a liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}, an acquirer account {?acquirer_account}, and a merchant routing profile {?merchant_routing_profile}
action_nl_templates_indef.compute_authorization_with_routing: compute authorization with routing for a dispute case {?dispute_case} using a card network {?card_network}, a beneficiary account {?beneficiary_account}, and an issuer routing profile {?issuer_routing_profile}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_authorization: finalize authorization for a dispute case {?dispute_case} using a liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket} and an acquirer account {?acquirer_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_compliance_and_confirm: apply compliance and confirm for a dispute case {?dispute_case} using an external refund account {?external_refund_account} and a compliance record {?compliance_record}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_refund_account_finalized: mark refund account finalized for a dispute case {?dispute_case} with an external refund account {?external_refund_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.consume_manual_token_and_mark_final: consume a manual approval token {?manual_approval_token} and mark a dispute case {?dispute_case} final
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_template_to_case: bind a payout instruction template {?payout_instruction_template} to a dispute case {?dispute_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_template_binding: confirm binding of a payout instruction template {?payout_instruction_template} to an external case {?external_case_id} with an internal case {?internal_case_id}
action_nl_templates_indef.acknowledge_finalization: acknowledge finalization of a dispute case {?dispute_case} with an external refund account {?external_refund_account} and a compliance record {?compliance_record}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_settlement: finalize settlement for a dispute case {?dispute_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_settlement_with_template_bindin: finalize settlement for a dispute case {?dispute_case} with a payout instruction template {?payout_instruction_template}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_settlement_with_acknowledgement: finalize settlement for a dispute case {?dispute_case} with acknowledgement

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a dispute case or a payout rail or a settlement schedule or a acquirer account or a liquidity bucket or a card network or a external refund account or a manual approval token or a payout instruction template or a compliance record or a clearing reference or a beneficiary account or a routing profile is also a object
Everything that is a merchant routing profile or a issuer routing profile is also a routing profile
Everything that is a dispute case internal or a dispute case external is also a dispute case
